name: Century Global Commodities Corporation
summary: Century Global Commodities Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, explores for and develops mineral properties in Canada. It focuses on exploring iron ores, and precious and base metals. The company's flagship project is the Joyce Lake Property, a direct shipping iron ore project that comprises six mineral licenses, which include a total of 682 claims covering a total area of approximately 17,049 hectares located in Newfoundland and Labrador. It also provides bilingual Chinese/English mining investment evaluation and tracking system that tracks globally listed mining and mineral resource companies with focus on gold and copper projects. The company offers its technology for retail and institutional investors, as well as for mining professionals. In addition, it distributes food and other consumer goods to supermarket chains, hotels, and restaurants, as well as international airline food service providers in Mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macau. Century Global Commodities Corporation is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
